title: get_block_range: no validation that start <= end
description: wallet/src/client.rs, get_block_range(start, end): no assertion that start <= end before issuing the RPC. If called with start > end (scanner off-by-one, chain reorg), server behavior is undefined — may return empty stream, error, or reverse-order blocks. Fix: guard at function entry with anyhow::bail! on start > end.
